verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Be faithful to the Lord While you’re still living, Offer yourself to Christ, A living sacrifice.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No greater love is there to give, That is your love to share, To win more souls to Christ, Through suffering in pain.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Be faithful to the Lord, While you’re still living, What is your greatest time, To be used in this world.
